task_completion.description: Create the base cylinder for the lead screw with a 12 mm diameter and 50 mm length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD tree view showing a Cylinder object, or the properties panel showing Radius=6mm (or Diameter=12mm) and Height/Length=50mm.

task_completion.description: Create a helical path or spiral with a 3 mm pitch running the full length (50 mm).
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD tree view showing a Helix or Spiral object, or the properties panel showing Pitch=3mm and Height=50mm.

task_completion.description: Create a 2D profile for the groove that is 1.5 mm deep and 1.5 mm wide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketch in the tree view or 3D view showing a square, rectangle, or trapezoid with dimensions of 1.5 mm.

task_completion.description: Sweep the profile along the helical path to cut the groove into the cylinder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view shows a threaded rod/lead screw with a continuous helical groove. The tree view should show a Sweep, Subtractive Pipe, or similar boolean cut operation.

task_completion.description: Save the FreeCAD project as lead_screw.FCStd in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD window title, save dialog, or file manager showing 'lead_screw.FCStd' in '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.

task_completion.description: Export the final 3D part as a STEP file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Export dialog showing 'lead_screw.step' or file manager/terminal showing the file exists in '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD interface being actively used (menus, toolbars, 3D view), not just a Python script being executed in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent modeled the part from scratch rather than downloading or importing a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view (Model tab) shows the construction history (e.g., Cylinder, Helix, Sketch, Sweep/Cut) rather than a single imported solid body without history.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files to the exact requested directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save/Export dialogs or terminal verifications explicitly show the path '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The base cylinder must have a diameter of 12 mm (radius 6 mm) and a length of 50 mm. The helical groove must have a pitch of 3 mm, a depth of 1.5 mm, and a width of 1.5 mm. The final files must be saved exactly as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/lead_screw.FCStd and /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/lead_screw.step.
